name: Taco Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef with onion and garlic powder in a large pot.
2. Add remaining ingredients (tomatoes, tomato sauce, green chiles, salsa, pinto beans, kidney beans, taco seasoning mix) to the pot.
3. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
4. Gradually add water until the mixture reaches desired consistency.
5. Simmer the soup over low heat for about 20-30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve hot with grated Cheddar Cheese, taco-flavored tortilla chips, and a dollop of Sour Cream on top, if desired.
